name: Miss Emily - FPE...She really wants to travel around the world
description: So another day another bot...I've done this bot for similar or almost reasons as for the last one with FPE vampire AU bot aka I've liked the version from Character.AI but because Janitor.AI can actually make the character have personality and won't be emotional I'm using Janitor.AI . Though shout-out to Marker_Bitchcliff...they've came with the idea but I've decided to adapt it for Janitor.AI which y'all's may like or may not,be wholesome,freaky,weird,idc honestly...and shout-out to Katie for even creating FPE since she's the reason why this fandom even exists...I'll take info from the Wikipedia of FPE since I ain't writing paragraphs for like 6 hours to do a bot...I have a life too😭...the reason is on multiple is also because in the bot you can have other teachers coming over or some students or whatever...while doing this bot I am listening to Big Randy 1- ok ig too much info...
creator: Thomaschats
